A

addHistoryRecord(String) - Method in class mvc.model.Model
Adds a history record to Model.historyList.
AppContextListener - Class in mvc.controller
Manages the context of the application.
AppContextListener() - Constructor for class mvc.controller.AppContextListener
Default constructor of the AppContextListener is empty.
appendKeyToHistory() - Method in class mvc.model.Model
Adds all key entries into the history list Model.historyList.

C

character() - Method in record class mvc.model.FrequencyPair
Returns the value of the character record component.
checkStringForEncoding(String) - Method in class mvc.model.Model
Validates the string for encoding process.
clearHistoryList() - Method in class mvc.model.Model
Clears the contents of the Model.historyList.
clearKey() - Method in class mvc.model.Model
Clears the contents of Model.key.
contextInitialized(ServletContextEvent) - Method in class mvc.controller.AppContextListener
Invoked when the servlets of the application are created.

D

DBManager - Class in mvc.model
Serves as a communication device between servlets and the DB.
DBManager(String) - Constructor for class mvc.model.DBManager
Constructor of the DBManager class.
decrypt(String) - Method in class mvc.model.Model
Accepts a message string, composed of phonograms and decodes it to english alphabet.
doGet(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Method in class mvc.controller.HistoryManager
Handles the HTTP GET method.
doGet(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Method in class mvc.controller.ProcessInput
Handles the HTTP GET method.
doPost(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Method in class mvc.controller.HistoryManager
Handles the HTTP POST method.
doPost(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Method in class mvc.controller.ProcessInput
Handles the HTTP POST method.

E

encrypt(String) - Method in class mvc.model.Model
Accepts a message string and encrypts it according to Model.key.
equals(Object) - Method in record class mvc.model.FrequencyPair
Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.
equals(Object) - Method in record class mvc.model.HistoryRecord
Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.
equals(Object) - Method in record class mvc.model.KeyParameters
Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.
equals(Object) - Method in record class mvc.model.MessageBoxParameters
Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.
equals(Object) - Method in class mvc.model.TableInput
Comparison function for two objects of type TableInput.
equals(Object) - Method in class mvc.model.TableOutput
Compares the instance of the table with other object.

F

findInputs() - Method in class mvc.model.DBManager
Returns the contents of the inputs table.
findOutputs() - Method in class mvc.model.DBManager
Parses the outputs table and returns its contents.
frequency() - Method in record class mvc.model.FrequencyPair
Returns the value of the frequency record component.
FrequencyPair - Record Class in mvc.model
Pairs strings with doubles.
FrequencyPair(String, Double) - Constructor for record class mvc.model.FrequencyPair
Creates an instance of a FrequencyPair record class.

G

generateDefaultKey() - Method in class mvc.model.Model
Assigns each letter from Model.allEncodedCharacters a single encryption character.
generateKey() - Method in class mvc.model.Model
For each letter from Model.allEncodedCharacters an array of encryption charaters is generated.
getHistoryList() - Method in class mvc.model.Model
Getter for the Model.historyList.
getServletInfo() - Method in class mvc.controller.HistoryManager
Returns a short description of the servlet.
getServletInfo() - Method in class mvc.controller.ProcessInput
Returns a short description of the servlet.

H

hashCode() - Method in record class mvc.model.FrequencyPair
Returns a hash code value for this object.
hashCode() - Method in record class mvc.model.HistoryRecord
Returns a hash code value for this object.
hashCode() - Method in record class mvc.model.KeyParameters
Returns a hash code value for this object.
hashCode() - Method in record class mvc.model.MessageBoxParameters
Returns a hash code value for this object.
hashCode() - Method in class mvc.model.TableInput
Hash function for this object.
hashCode() - Method in class mvc.model.TableOutput
Hashing function of this object.
HistoryManager - Class in mvc.controller
Displays history of operations which is stored in the Model from MVC pattern.
HistoryManager() - Constructor for class mvc.controller.HistoryManager
Cosntructor of the HistoryManager is empty.
HistoryRecord - Record Class in mvc.model
Stores information about single history record, put in the history table.
HistoryRecord(int, String) - Constructor for record class mvc.model.HistoryRecord
Creates an instance of a HistoryRecord record class.

I

idx() - Method in record class mvc.model.HistoryRecord
Returns the value of the idx record component.
init() - Method in class mvc.controller.HistoryManager
Inits the HistoryManger servlet.
init() - Method in class mvc.controller.ProcessInput
Initiates the servlet.
init(KeyParameters) - Method in class mvc.model.Model
Initilizes fields related to key generation.
isPhonogramsNumSufficient(KeyParameters) - Method in class mvc.model.Model
Checks if provided combination of minimal and maximal numbers of phongrams, assigned to a single letter as well as the length of a phonogram are valid.

K

KeyParameters - Record Class in mvc.model
Parameters necessary for the Model class, to generate a new custom key.
KeyParameters(int, int, int) - Constructor for record class mvc.model.KeyParameters
Creates an instance of a KeyParameters record class.

M

maxPhonograms() - Method in record class mvc.model.KeyParameters
Returns the value of the maxPhonograms record component.
message() - Method in record class mvc.model.HistoryRecord
Returns the value of the message record component.
message() - Method in record class mvc.model.MessageBoxParameters
Returns the value of the message record component.
MessageBoxParameters - Record Class in mvc.model
Holds data necessary for initialization of a message box (JOptionPane).
MessageBoxParameters(int, String, String) - Constructor for record class mvc.model.MessageBoxParameters
Creates an instance of a MessageBoxParameters record class.
minPhonograms() - Method in record class mvc.model.KeyParameters
Returns the value of the minPhonograms record component.
Model - Class in mvc.model
Represents the Model component in the MVC pattern.
Model() - Constructor for class mvc.model.Model
Constructs the Model instances and initilizes internal parameters: Model.allEncodedCharacters, Model.allPhonograms, Model.key, Model.frequencyTable, Model.nonHandledCharacters.
mvc.controller - package mvc.controller
The controller of the MVC pattern.
mvc.model - package mvc.model
Package contains two classes Model and UnknownPhonogramException.

P

persistObject(Object) - Method in class mvc.model.DBManager
Stores given object in the DB.
phonogramLength() - Method in record class mvc.model.KeyParameters
Returns the value of the phonogramLength record component.
ProcessInput - Class in mvc.controller
Servlet responsible for processing user input (encoding / decoding of strings).
ProcessInput() - Constructor for class mvc.controller.ProcessInput
ProcessInput servlet constructor is empty.
processRequest(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Method in class mvc.controller.HistoryManager
Processes requests for both HTTP GET and POST methods.
processRequest(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Method in class mvc.controller.ProcessInput
Processes requests for both HTTP GET and POST methods.

T

TableInput - Class in mvc.model
Table stores the "input" strings.
TableInput() - Constructor for class mvc.model.TableInput
Default constructor is empty.
TableOutput - Class in mvc.model
Table stores outputs of user operations.
TableOutput() - Constructor for class mvc.model.TableOutput
Empty constructor.
testEncryptedString(String) - Method in class mvc.model.Model
Validates encrypted string, if it contains legal phonogram characters (phonogram must belong to Model.allPhonograms.
title() - Method in record class mvc.model.MessageBoxParameters
Returns the value of the title record component.
toString() - Method in record class mvc.model.FrequencyPair
Returns a string representation of this record class.
toString() - Method in record class mvc.model.HistoryRecord
Returns a string representation of this record class.
toString() - Method in record class mvc.model.KeyParameters
Returns a string representation of this record class.
toString() - Method in record class mvc.model.MessageBoxParameters
Returns a string representation of this record class.
type() - Method in record class mvc.model.MessageBoxParameters
Returns the value of the type record component.

U

UnknownPhonogramException - Exception Class in mvc.model
Thrown when an unknown encryption character (phongram)is encoutered during decding process.
UnknownPhonogramException(String) - Constructor for exception class mvc.model.UnknownPhonogramException
Constructs the new exception with specified detailed message.
